content:
🌟 GitJournal | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: A private and portable note-taking solution integrated with Git for version control and flexible hosting.
✨ Key Features: • Mobile-first note taking • Stores notes in Git repositories • Uses Markdown + YAML header format • Supports GitHub, GitLab, and custom Git providers • Focus on privacy and data portability
📖 Summary: GitJournal is a mobile-first note-taking application that prioritizes privacy and data portability by storing notes in a standardized Markdown format within a Git repository. Users can choose to self-host their notes or use various Git providers like GitHub and GitLab.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
